title: Upeppy Crisp Thai Passion Fruit Pilaf
description: A festive and peppery dish featuring a blend of Thai ingredients including passion fruit pulp, wrapped in a fragrant pilaf made with basmati rice.

ingredients.name: 2 ripe
ingredients.amount: passion fruits, pulp removed and seeds left in place

instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (205 degrees C).
Cook rice in 2 cups water until tender, about 30 minutes.
In a large skillet over medium heat, melt butter and oil together.
Add onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in chickpeas, tuna, cilantro, passion fruit pulp with seeds, yogurt, and lime juice.
Gently fold rice into the vegetable mixture until well combined.
Transfer to a baking dish and bake for 10 minutes or until heated through and lightly golden on top.
